introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Parc des Combes in Creusot, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened on 2 June 2011 with a press preview the previous day.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Parc des Combes in Creusot, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

The ride opened on 2 June 2011 with a press preview the previous day.
